{{CargoOrgan
|name=Shifting Dune Markings
|type=Bionic
|rank=blue
|id=10657
|idx=14
|description=These ever-flowing sand patterns hum ancient ballads in the wind, their granular symphony masking a startling truth - beneath lies pulsating life waiting to erupt.
|skill=Transform into a sandstorm, dealing DMG
equal to 154% of ATK!
|hp=780
|def=146
|atk=115
|rush=78
|gene1=During exploration, Earth DMG +60
|gene2=In explorations, {race} DEF +20
|gene3=In explorations, Dodge +3%
|gene7=In explorations, Dodge +3% (Awakened)
|}}
